Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch Basic and Normal tiers to Gemini 3.1 Flash for instant rendering

Critical Fix: Replicate models have unacceptable cold-start latency (60+ seconds)

Changes:
- Replace render-basic.js: Now uses Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview
- Replace render-normal.js: Now uses Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview
- Both tiers now return synchronous responses (no polling needed)
- Expected render time: 3-5 seconds for both tiers

Technical Details:
- Uses gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview model
- Synchronous API (returns imageBase64 immediately)
- No async polling required - iOS client handles this automatically
- GEMINI_API_KEY already configured in Vercel environment

Quality Tier Summary:
- Basic: Gemini 3.1 Flash (~3-5 seconds, synchronous)
- Normal: Gemini 3.1 Flash (~3-5 seconds, synchronous)
- Realistic: Stable Interiors V2 (~7-10 seconds, async polling)
- Hyper-Realistic: SDXL ProMax (~60-90 seconds, async polling)

commit.message:
Fix background preservation: use pixel-diff threshold mask for brightness blending

Background pixels were changing because JPEG re-encoding introduces ±1-2
noise per channel. Pre-compute a blend mask from pixel differences between
original and processed images: small diff (<=4) = background (mask=0),
large diff (>=12) = face (mask=1), smooth transition in between. This
ensures background pixels are never modified during slider adjustment.

commit.message:
fix: freeze ledger analytics columns were always NaN

Root cause: decision_snapshot merge duplicated pattern_primary,
sharp_score, consensus_score, retail_score, layer_mode in both
_ds_side and _ds_game, causing pandas _x/_y suffix collision.
The original column names became missing, so the fallback at
line 4697 created them as empty strings.

Fix: remove duplicate analytics columns from _ds_game_cols —
they already come from _ds_side (from latest DataFrame).
Also add market_reaction_score/detail to _side_cols and _cols.

commit.message:
Initial commit: Unclause — full application

Complete production-ready build of Unclause, a free public-interest
consumer protection tool that analyzes Terms & Conditions, Privacy
Policies, EULAs and any legal document using Google Gemini 1.5 Flash.

Pages built:
- Landing page with Understand Mode + Fight Back Mode dual input
- /analyze/[id] — full results with verdict, red flags, key topics
- /fightback/[id] — claim verdict, leverage, pre-written letters
- /how-it-works, /hall-of-shame, /companies, /clauses, /changes
- /coming-soon, /about, /donate, /privacy

Features:
- 4 input methods: URL scraping, PDF URL, PDF upload, raw text paste
- Smart input type detection (URL/PDF/text)
- Google Gemini 1.5 Flash AI analysis with structured JSON output
- Supabase caching (URL-hash keyed, zero user data stored)
- Dark mode default with light mode toggle
- SAFE/CAUTION/DANGER verdict badges
- Document type detection (T&C, Privacy Policy, EULA, etc.)
- Jurisdiction-aware analysis
- Pre-written complaint letters in Fight Back mode
- Animated loading steps
- Graceful daily limit message with donate CTA
- Full responsive design (320px to 4K)
- Security headers, sitemap, robots.txt
- TypeScript strict, builds clean with 0 errors

Stack: Next.js 16, Tailwind CSS, Plus Jakarta Sans + DM Mono,
Gemini AI, Supabase, Cheerio, pdf-parse

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Investigative Agent: 8P/1Pa/1F → 10P/0Pa/0F (PERFECT — P5+P6 fixed)

- GCC MCP: 4P/3Pa/3F → 4P/2Pa/4F (GPT-4o couldn't execute retests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Distinguish 501 Not Implemented from 500 Internal Error

Previously HTTP 500 was overloaded with 5 meanings: not implemented,
Moto stub, internal crash, deregistered service, and chaos injection.
Now NotImplementedError consistently returns 501 with error code
"NotImplemented", while genuine crashes remain 500 with the actual
exception type as the error code.

Changes:
- moto_bridge: catch NotImplementedError separately → 501; Moto returning
  None → 501 directly instead of raising+catching
- handlers.py error_normalizer: NotImplementedError → 501, others → 500
  with type(exc).__name__ as error code (not hardcoded InternalError)
- ec2 provider: same NotImplementedError → 501 distinction
- probe scripts: recognize 501 as "not_implemented" cleanly
- integration tests: accept 501 where 500 was previously tolerated
- 4 new unit tests for the 501/500 distinction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

route at grafana.cassandrasedge.com.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add investment record and philosophy to /think-like-sraffa and /think-like-keynes

Sraffa: New "Investment Assessment" register based on Lonergan's
archival study of Sraffa's Japanese government bond trading (1946-1960),
Kaldor's memoir of his investment philosophy, and the gold conversion.
14-16% annualised over 37 years from a single concentrated position.

Keynes: Expanded "Financial/Speculative Assessment" register with his
full investment record -- King's College Chest (16% annualised, 8pp
alpha), personal portfolio evolution from macro speculator to value
investor, the 1938 investment manifesto, and Chambers/Dimson's
quantitative analysis. Added investment quotes to memorable passages.

Sources: Lonergan (2024), Kaldor (1985), Chambers & Dimson (2013, 2015),
Wasik (2013).

commit.message:
feat: SEO/AI citation optimization — public product pages, structured data, internal linking

Phase A: Add Ingredients, Products, Best Products to homepage nav + footer
Phase B: Create public product teaser pages outside auth-gated (app) route group
  - Public /products listing with category browse, top brands, stats
  - Public /products/[id] with SEO metadata, JSON-LD (Product, FAQ, WebPage paywall schema), gated intelligence sections
  - ProductsNav shared navigation component
  - Remove conflicting (app)/products pages (subscribers use dashboard)
Phase C: Content enrichment for AI citation
  - SpeakableSpecification on blog posts and ingredient pages
  - dateModified/datePublished on ingredient JSON-LD from rich_content_generated_at
  - dateModified on product JSON-LD from updated_at
  - isAccessibleForFree WebPage schema on product pages
  - Citation-friendly effectiveness summary paragraphs on ingredients
  - Visible excerpt paragraph on blog posts for SpeakableSpecification
Phase D: Internal linking architecture (hub-and-spoke)
  - Ingredient names link to /ingredients/[slug] on product and best-of pages
  - Cross-link sections on ingredient pages (All Ingredients, Best Serums, etc.)
  - Related blog articles section on product pages
  - Category browse + best-of links on product pages
Phase E: Robots.txt strategy
  - Block training bots (GPTBot, Google-Extended, CCBot, anthropic-ai)
  - Allow retrieval bots (ChatGPT-User, OAI-SearchBot, Claude-Web, PerplexityBot)
  - Block auth-gated routes from all crawlers
Phase F: Content freshness via rich_content_generated_at timestamps
Sitemap: Add all product pages (~5,800 URLs) with priority scoring
